title: Warden Bar
description: Adds a boss bar to the Warden.
body:
# Warden Boss Bar

Adds a dynamic boss bar to the Warden so encounters feel more intense and informative.

✔ Boss bar tracks Warden health in real time

✔ Supports multiple Wardens (tested with up to 10 simultaneously)

✔ Server-friendly and lightweight

✔ Works in survival, adventure maps, and custom servers

✔ Easy to extend for more Wardens if needed

Perfect for players and server owners who want deeper Warden encounters without changing core gameplay.
